description: Document in Arabic script. Two very narrow vertical strips filled with rudimentary Arabic script. Likely magical, but this is based entirely on appearance rather than reading any of the content. (MR) The name of God appears very often and is sometimes followed or preceded by a shahāda. A prayer or incantation? (YU)
description_he: מסמך בכתב ערבי; שני רצועות אנכיות צרות מאוד עם כתב ערבי בסיסי; כנראה קמע; שם האל מופיע לעיתים קרובות ולעיתים מלווה בשהאדה
